title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 531.060 - Time for pleading fixed by court
text:
531.060.  Time for pleading fixed by court. — The court in which any information shall be exhibited shall allow to the relator and the defendant such convenient time to answer, reply or make a motion as shall seem just and reasonable.
(RSMo 1939 § 1787, A. 1949 H.B. 2132) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 1623; 1919 § 2071; 1909 § 2636
